root_text.an10.175:1.1: “Saparikkamano ayaṁ, bhikkhave, dhammo, nāyaṁ dhammo aparikkamano.
root_text.an10.175:1.2: Kathañca, bhikkhave, saparikkamano ayaṁ dhammo, nāyaṁ dhammo aparikkamano?
root_text.an10.175:1.3: Pāṇātipātissa, bhikkhave, pāṇātipātā veramaṇī parikkamanaṁ hoti.
root_text.an10.175:1.4: Adinnādāyissa, bhikkhave, adinnādānā veramaṇī parikkamanaṁ hoti.
root_text.an10.175:1.5: Kāmesumicchācārissa, bhikkhave, kāmesumicchācārā veramaṇī parikkamanaṁ hoti.
root_text.an10.175:1.6: Musāvādissa, bhikkhave, musāvādā veramaṇī parikkamanaṁ hoti.
root_text.an10.175:1.7: Pisuṇavācassa, bhikkhave, pisuṇāya vācāya veramaṇī parikkamanaṁ hoti.
root_text.an10.175:1.8: Pharusavācassa, bhikkhave, pharusāya vācāya veramaṇī parikkamanaṁ hoti.
root_text.an10.175:1.9: Samphappalāpissa, bhikkhave, samphappalāpā veramaṇī parikkamanaṁ hoti.
root_text.an10.175:1.13: Evaṁ kho, bhikkhave, saparikkamano ayaṁ dhammo, nāyaṁ dhammo aparikkamano”ti.

translation_text.an10.175:1.1: “Mendicants, this teaching provides a bypass, it doesn’t lack a bypass.
translation_text.an10.175:1.2: And how does this teaching provide a bypass, not lacking a bypass?
translation_text.an10.175:1.3: Not killing living creatures bypasses killing living creatures.
translation_text.an10.175:1.5: Avoiding sexual misconduct bypasses sexual misconduct.
translation_text.an10.175:1.7: Avoiding divisive speech bypasses divisive speech.
translation_text.an10.175:1.8: Avoiding harsh speech bypasses harsh speech.
translation_text.an10.175:1.9: Avoiding talking nonsense bypasses talking nonsense.
translation_text.an10.175:1.13: That’s how this teaching provides a bypass, it doesn’t lack a bypass.”
